ham.subject: Upcoming Fall Semester Registration Deadlines – Action Required
ham.body:
Dear Students,

This is a reminder that registration for the Fall 2026 semester will close on September 12th.  If you have not yet finalized your course schedule or requested add/drop, please log in to the Student Portal by September 9th to avoid falling behind.

Key dates to remember:
- Add/Drop deadline: September 12, 11:59 PM
- Tuition and fee payment deadline: September 10, 3:00 PM (IRS deadline for installment plans)
- Academic advising appointments available: September 5–8

For any questions, contact the Registrar’s office at registrar@university.edu or call 555‑123‑4567.

Best regards,

Dr. Elena Ramirez
Registrar
University of State

spam.subject: Urgent: Your 2025 Federal Tax Refund Is Pending – Claim Now
spam.body:
Dear Taxpayer,

Our records indicate that your 2025 federal tax refund check has been delayed due to incomplete documentation.  Failure to receive your refund within 24 hours will result in a permanent withholding of your refund credit.

Click the link below to verify your identity and download the missing documents:
<URL>

This is a bona fide Government Tax Service.  If you do not act immediately, your refund will be permanently forfeited.

Thank you,

Internal Revenue Tax Check Office
